name: Matias Oyarzun
text: Kyle, Tyler and Professional Pet Nanny have been a part of our pet family for 10+ years now. They provide the absolute best pet care imaginable. They truly love what they do and it shows in the level of care and attention to detail. Our kitty Charlie absolutely adores his Nanny’s. They are very attentive, take care of our precious baby and home while we are on travel, and provide daily updates with pictures via their app, which is super easy to use. I recommend them to all our my friends and colleagues and cannot say enough great things about them. Looking forward to another 10+ years with then

name: Laurel Brown
text: Pet Nanny professionals will take very good care of your furry family members, especially giving them all the TLC they are missing from you, while you are gone. We have used their services for many years now, and are grateful for the care and love they give our sweet critter, as well as the regular communications (and pictures) they provide to us. We know our fur-child is in good hands!

name: Cynthia Holman
text: I've used them since I've moved to Cincinnati. They've been absolutely wonderful, even helping out when I had last minute travel around Christmas. My pets love them and they've taken amazing care of my cat, dog, and rabbits.

name: Christie K
text: Kyle has always been a consistent, reliable, and knowledgeable pet sitter. I can always count on her to show up and take good care of not just Kitty but also my place while I’m out of town. Always gives me peace of mind. But two summers ago when Kitty got sick and stopped eating, the vet only provided options for putting him down. Kyle was such an amazing support system and recommended a nutritional paste, which I used as a medium for administering Kitty’s medicine. Her compassion and knowledge were so important during a very scary time. I am fully convinced that Kitty is still alive today thanks to Kyle’s guidance 🙏 a true life saver. 100/10.

name: Sandy Brewer
text: I have been using the Professional Pet Nanny services for several years now and fully trust Kyle and Tyler with my fur babies and my home. When we travel, they take care of my 2 Bengal boys (cats) and always do a great job. They also keep my plants alive and well while we are away. We have also used them for home watch when we are all away and they do a great job with that as well and we can rest easy knowing that all is okay while we are away. They are great about communicating any issues and they follow-up with pics for both pet and home watch services which we like. I highly recommend their services for pet or home watch.

name: Patricia Sheerin
text: I was very happy with the services provided. Very professional and took the time to get to know me and my cats so she could better serve them. Spent focused time socializing and exercising my cats. I was sent daily updates to assure me that everything was going smoothly. My cats seemed happy and healthy when I returned home. I will definitely being using her services int he future.

name: Stacy C.
text: I love Kyle and her team! With very little notice, they were able to care for my cat and walk my dog and provide daily updates.

name: Bill Waskowitz
text: Kyle is a fantastic pet sitter: always communicates on time, is punctual, and is a calm and compassionate lover of animals.

name: Scott Finn

One of our cats was quite sick for a while and needed to receive daily medications. We were very glad that we had someone we could trust to get the medicine to her in a timely manner.

text: Kyle is an awesome Nanny who genuinely takes good care for our kitties. Recommended to use this service. Your pet will be in safe hands!!

text: We’ve been using PPN for the last 5 yrs and we couldn’t be happier! Our family lives out of town so we travel quite often. Our cat is very shy and rarely comes out but with every visit they are always making the effort to find her and give her pets. They never skimp on time and always make sure our house is in order by bringing the mail in and alarm on. They are truly the best!

name: Davese Slaughter
text: My kitty crew of 4 and I had the honor and the pleasure of meeting Kyle back in October of 2024. This lady is amazing! She is like a fairy god mother to animals. If you want someone who truly cares about the well being of your pets while you are away, look no further. She came to meet all of them, get an understanding of their different personalities and treated them accordingly. Oh and she is the master of playtime! She will have your kitties the happiest they've ever been which means you'll have some stepping up to do when you get back just as I did lol! She sends you pics and updates with every visit possible. She took such great care of my diabetics kitty and I'll be forever grateful. I was so scared that I was going to worry about him the whole time but Kyle quickly put me at ease. I will definitely be hiring Professional Pet Nanny again for future needs. 10 stars!!

name: Nicole Dziggel
text: I am so happy we found Professional Pet Nanny/Kyle! The best pet care we have experienced. I felt extremely comfortable leaving our two cats and not having to worry about them. We got updates on play, medicine, food, water-you name it. Amazing care and service. We are so happy to have reliable pet care we can trust now!

name: Margo L.
text: Professional Pet Nanny is the best! I've been using them to watch my kitties for over ten years now--they are completely trustworthy, reliable, and excellent care givers! They even took the best care ever when one of my sweet fur babies had to cross the rainbow bridge and I was overseas for a work trip. I HIGHLY recommend them!

name: Jessica and Frank Coffey
text: This is our first time having a pet nanny and we couldn’t have asked for anything better. Kyle from day one was accommodating and helped with every step. We were still nervous leaving our 4 kitties, but by day 2 didn’t worry at all. We were updated at every visit with email and pictures. She managed to get the big girls to play too! Kyle even cleaned, dishes, vacuumed, watered the plants, left lights on at night etc. And unless it’s my imagination the bigs and littles like each other a little more than when we left! The only problem is I think our cats now think we are boring and are waiting to play with Kyle again!! This will not be the last time we have Kyle and Tyler watch over our furry kiddos!!

name: Kristina Bomkamp
text: So very happy with my services while I was away for ten days. Carmen, left amazing photos and messages about all my babies and I felt so relieved to know that they were so taken care of!!!!! Thank you!!!!

name: Ashley Palin
text: Our cat has separation anxiety and doesn't like when we go out of town. So when they did the home visit, we were surprised how well our fur baby responded! She was playing and having a great time! We'll be booking again in the future!

name: Linda W.
text: the best thing I ever did was to have the pet nanny look after my dog. the peace of mind knowing that she would be there was amazing. Every visit I received a text with pictures of them playing or walking. Kyle went above and beyond by watering my plants,getting my mail and taking care of my stray cat. she even spent extra time with my dog as it was the 4th of July and the fireworks were upsetting him. highly recommend.

name: Linda Waechter
text: So glad I found Kyle, the pet nanny. I was able to go on vacation without the stress of making sure my neighbors or friends would remember to care for my dog. She took him for walks and played in the backyard with him. I love the update with pictures from every visit.

name: Allison Jenkins
text: Absolutely phenomenal service!! Loved seeing the pets so happy and well taken care of in the daily updates and everyone has been fantastic to work with!!

name: Jenifer Edmiston Harris
text: Every year when we are on vacation fantastic care for all of our animals-cats, fish, geckos, snake, turtle, axolotls. Including our plants and the house in general. They offer a peace of mind that is hard to find. Always friendly and super reliable with responsive communication. They clearly love the pets they care for and send great pictures I don’t know what we would do without them!

name: Carolyn Doerning
text: I chose to switch my pet sitting needs to Professional Pet Nanny after being disappointed with reliability of Rover. I have been so pleased with the care Kyle provides for my kitties, especially the amount of time she spends getting to know them and their style of play. I receive pictures from each visit that show them playing and enjoying meals, putting my mind at ease. When I come back home, everything is just as it should be. I know my cats are more comfortable staying at home while I travel, and the app is super convenient for booking and staying in touch with updates during my travel. Would recommend to anyone who wants peace of mind knowing their pets are in professional hands!

name: Adrienne Robinson
text: I have had nothing but great service from Kyle and/or her team for my two cats Watson and Holmes on multiple occasions. I would recommend their services to any pet parent in the area!! Her level of service is way beyond what you pay for. For example, she changes the water fountain water each day, waters plants, and even tidies up my kitchen! I have SO much comfort in receiving the daily pictures and updates in the app after each visit while I'm away. It always makes me feel so much better seeing my cats thriving when I'm not home. And the level of playtime is EPIC! Every time Kyle plays with my cats, they have SO much fun, I buy new toys when I get home so they continue to like me as much as they like Kyle! 😹 I am so thankful to have someone trustworthy and knowledgeable care for and love my boys when I'm out of town!

name: Mary Beth Crocker
text: As always, Professional Pet Nanny took excellent care of our kitties, Minnie, Cecil and Samuel, including playing with them each time they visited, which was twice a day! They also took care of the mail and our plants, which were so happy. Most of all, we have peace of mind knowing everything will be perfect when we’re back home.

name: Alyssa
text: Kyle did a wonderful job watching our 10 year old golden doodle for overnights and day walks! Kyle is very details and wants to know everything about your house and dog to make sure nothing could go wrong! Our dog has cancer and Kyle made sure to meet all of his needs! 100 percent would recommend! She does a fantastic job and even updates you every few hours!

name: Emily K
text: My cat requires intense play, twice a day visits, and he gets lonely easily. He also requires spotless litter boxes because of a history of urinary crystals. For three years, I have been able to rely on the nannies to take care of Ed. They come twice a day, send pictures, and put on music for him. I never worry if he’s ok. I come home and it’s obvious he has been cared for by cat people. They’ve accommodated last minute trips for family emergencies, come to my house in a blizzard, and always been trustworthy. When Ed hears Kyle’s voice, he comes running and he cries when she leaves. My cat loves her deeply. If you want a cat person to care for your cat, I can’t sing high enough praises.

name: James S
text: This company is awesome! I wouldn't have anyone else watch my house and cats while I was gone. It's super easy to book time. They hang out with my furry roommates and exercise them. They always leave my house in better condition than I left it. I can't recommend ProPetNanny enough.

name: James S.
text: This company is amazing! I wouldn't have anyone else watch over my house and furry roommates. It is super easy to book a time and they have always been easy to communicate with. They hang our with my cats, play with them and leave my house looking better than I left it. I cannot recommend ProPetNanny enough!

name: Annie V.
text: I have a strong recommendation for Professional Pet Nanny Kyle. My cat is older, and needs medication. She is shy and doesn't take to many people. Kyle always is responsible with house and property, and follows medication instructions clearly. She truly loves animals and it shows! If there is any question at all she will call or text me.

name: Colleen Klimara
text: I have been a client of Professional Pet Nanny for years. Kyle and her team continually provide excellent care for my cat. More importantly, during the recent year when I was frequently traveling unexpectedly due to dying parents, this team went above and beyond to be flexible and help support with Pavi’s care. I greatly appreciate all they do.

name: Andre Woodcock

name: Russell Winters

name: Steve G.
text: We were so pleased when we found this service online. They came out and spent time with us and we instantly knew our pets were in excellent hands. Even when it was freezing temperatures and snowing, she showed up at her regular time with her usual smile. I had even told her she could skip it with weather related traffic! She offers extremely reasonable rates for all the TLC your fur babies will receive.

She also leaves me a note on how things went and even takes the trash can to the curb! Highly recommend.

name: Annie
text: Highly recommend this service. Kyle is my pet nanny for my shy, older cat who needs medication daily. She truly understands cats and mine gets great care from this service. Love the app and the daily updates and pictures!

name: Patricia Carlyn

text: Kyle has provided excellent care for our kitties for many years. We can leave for a vacation and know they will be well taken care of! Thank you so much!

name: Connie t
text: After a fall that left me unable to walk without a cane, my first thought was how could I possibly keep my beloved dog. I went online and found Professional Pet Nanny. I found a professional who worries about the well-being of the pet's owner as well as the pet. And as for my dog, he found a friend. I highly recommend Professional Pet Nanny ****** **

name: Kimberly K.
text: I have used PPN for the 16 years I have lived in Cincinnati. Kyle & her team have known 5 of my cats; they have cared for them & loved them as if they were their own. In the "before times" I used traveled weekly for work & never worried about anything happening in my home while out of town. Setting up a reservation is easy, with a confirmation e-mail outlining all needs (medications, water plants, collect mail, etc..) so you know everything you have requested to care for your pet(s) will be handled. The prices are excellent, the team always goes beyond, and the extras, like pet photos sent during your trip, house tidied up, always a new toy or treat left for pets, progress report to let you know of any issues (emergency vet visit, package that didn't arrive), & happy, content, well-cared for, safe pets waiting for you upon your return. I have recommened PPN to neighbors & friends & will continue to do so.

name: Natasha Lovas
text: Kyle is the Mary Poppins of pet sitters. She first appeared at my door with a bag of treats and toys for my 2 kitties. They couldn't resist her. She carefully reviewed my plans and went over all the details with me before I left town. Once I was gone, she kept them wildly entertained. She had them running, chasing and jumping - they got in touch with their Inner Athletes, that's for sure. During each visit, she spent quality play time with the cats for at least 30 minutes, and even texted me photos, so I could witness their fun time with Kyle. In addition to the perfect pet care, Kyle also brought in the mail, emptied the garbage and made sure the home was secure, etc. I am going to go ahead and book my next 2 sessions with her and the team!

name: Stacey Klumb
text: Kyle and her team are beyond amazing. The day I called to talk about their services, I got so much more than another company that I had been emailing back and forth with. I offered to sit at the table to discuss our needs and the details but they went straight for the floor to get to know our pup! They are the nicest, most kindest people. They always keep us informed of how his day went and she worked with us on potty training techniques. I can't say enough great things about her and her team. If you are looking for support for your dog, this is the place you want!!!

name: Danielle B
text: I've used Professional Pet Nanny several times to look after my cat when I'm out of town. When I first signed up, Kyle came over to meet the animal, see the house, and go over any special needs the pet may have. From there on, I could just submit online when I would need someone to come over and for what types of services. For every visit, my cat would get fresh food and water, a clean litter box, and some play time. I never had any issues with scheduling and the website is very straight forward. The cost is very similar to boarding pets and this way they can stay in the comfort of their own home.

name: Danna Edgett
text: Kyle or someone from her team have been at our home several times. Three dogs and a cat live with us. They are so much more content when they are in their own surroundings. They get lots of play time and fed well, we get videos and photos of the visit which is so fun! Professional Pet Nanny takes excellent care of the animals but they also bring in mail, roll trash cans in and out, keep the house safe. I even came home to a lovely bowl of tangerines my last trip. I trust Professional Pet Nanny with my precious fur babies!

name: John G
text: We began using Professional Pet Nanny when the person who had been helping us with our dogs was no longer available to help. It can be stressful giving someone you don't know access to your home, especially when by design, you are not there. We have been very pleased with PPN, and they have done a great job looking after our four legged kids. We get updates after their visits, and they also maintain a notebook, kept in our home, which let's us know when they visited and what they did. It is all very reassuring.

name: Jason Rosencranz
text: We’ve had a very positive experience with Kyle and Ashten. We were visiting Cincinnati for a few weeks for work and realized only at the last minute that we needed pet care support. We get daily updates and our dog Molly gets along great with her. Overall a very positive experience, thank you Kyle and Ashten for really making all of this possible!

name: Carole Gibson
text: The Professional Pet Nanny is a wonderful service at a great price for those who what quality people who will really care for your pets in your absence. We loved to see his "report card" when we returned. He was always happy and content upon on return. We highly recommend!

name: Thomas Stutts
text: They think of everything, used them for 3 years now when going on vacation. The one time of year when I really can enjoy my away time and not worry about my 4 loving cats. Also keeps your home looking lived in while your gone, watering plants and open and closes blinds, wonderful service and very reasonably priced. Worth every penny to enjoy your time away.

name: Lisa Braun
text: I’ve been using Professional Pet Nanny for 15 years and they are like part of the family. They are happily to jump into action when I need a last minute walk in the evening or during the weekend. They always leave a note and often text photos during the their visit. They’re awesome!

name: Hannah Zalla

name: courtney kress
text: I had a wonderful experience with Professional Pet Nanny. My sitter, Kyle made my cat feel comfortable and allowed for me to not worry during my trip. name: Jessica Woo
text: We've used Professional Pet Nanny for years, and we love them. Appointments are easy to schedule, and we've never had a problem if we forget and have to schedule at the last minute. text: I've been using Professional Pet Nanny for eight years now! Kyle and Tyler make you feel like part of their family as well as your pet. My girl enjoys her walks and know she is treated great. name: Laura Dunderman
text: I couldn't be happier with Kyle and Professional Pet Nanny! I had other pet sitters who weren't getting the job done, and I'm so glad I found PPN. text: We are so thankful for Pat Nanny. It is so wonderful to leave home and know that our cat Molly will have visitors to play and cuddle with her while we're away. name: Asha Hosangadi
text: LOVE Professional Pet Nanny! Kyle and her team are so wonderful with my cats. Before hearing about PPN, I felt awful when I'd have to leave my 2 cats for longer than a couple days and they would suffer pretty terrible separation anxiety and would just seem all around miserable upon my return. I decided to give PPN a try when I went on an extended vacation and couldn't be happier with their professionalism and just pure love and kindness towards my cats and (I'm sure) all animals. Kyle set up a preliminary visit about a week before my vacation so she could meet my cats and have them get to know her, which I thought was a sweet touch. We had a long conversation before she came over about what my cats were like and she came prepared with special toys for each one! Her attention to detail is amazing. I definitely felt safe leaving them in her and her team's care after meeting her and seeing how she interacted with my cats, and more importantly, how my cats interacted with her. PPN also sends me pictures of my boys whenever they come check in on them and they leave a sweet little report card for each one. I use PPN every time I go out of town and am amazed that every time I call Kyle she immediately remembers my cats names and little personality quriks. That attention to detail is more than professionalism, it's pure love for what she does which is SO important since what she does is take care of your precious animals when you are away 🙂 I HIGHLY recommend Professional Pet Nanny.

name: Brandi Burgun
text: We hired Professional Pet Nanny a few years ago since all of our family was going with us on a trip - we needed a pet sitter. We had never had anyone but family do this. We had special needs and she had to visit several times per day. We loved our experience! Nanny Kyle met our pets prior to our departure and reviewed everything with us. During our trip we received daily photos and updates. We returned to find a clean home, happy pets and a detailed visit log. Kyle even brought a new toy and catnip for the babies. There was also classical music playing for them. One of my cats was a bit chubbier than I left him but that was probably stress eating on his part! I'm just glad he was comfortable enough to be eating! She also got the mail and took the trash out. We will be taking another family trip soon - we will need a sitter - and we plan on calling Nanny Kyle!!

name: D P
text: Our experience was a wonderful one with this service. We usually take all of our pets with us on vacations, but were unable to this time. We were worried about having someone come into our home, but all was wonderful. We loved their policies on requiring flea prevention and meet and greets. We got pictures and updates every day via email. They even purchased gifts for our critters. We came home to very content pets (all a little chubbier), flowers, a cooked meal, fruit, and even a chocolate cake. Our sitter even took care of the turning on and off the lights and tv, taking out the trash, and bringing in all packages and mail. The care and concern that our sitter showed for our pets, our home, and for us was so appreciated and sincere. We will use this service again and have recommended to everyone we know.

name: Laurel Brown
text: We have hired Professional Pet Nanny for several years now, to care for our dear "fur child" while we travel, sometimes for as much as six weeks at a time. We have been pleased with the apparent care they take in following written instructions for feeding our critter, watering plants, etc. They provide a daily "log" of care provided, and try to communicate with us via email as requested. We have had a misunderstanding or two, but were able to talk out the situation and reach an amenable solution -- that's key for me: I don't expect perfection, but I do expect the willingness to listen and discuss misunderstandings so we can resolve problems to our mutual satisfaction. So far, so good. We will definitely hire them again to care for our family member!

name: Nicki Beckett
text: Kyle and her team have been looking after my cats when I go on long vacations for about four years now. I have had three different nannies (including Kyle) depending on where I have lived. I love that I get texted photo updates a couple times a week and that the nannies leave daily "report cards" for me to check when I get home and see if there were any behavioral issues. I definitely recommend them for your Cincinnati area pet sitting needs!

text: Thank you Professional Pet Nanny for taking great care of Oscar and Tabby. I moved to the Cincinnati / N. Kentucky area a year ago September. I finally came across Professional Pet Nanny earlier in 2016. Professional Pet Nanny did a home visit so I could meet the individual who would be caring for my cats, I watched her and how she interacted with my cats and how she quickly was able to get them to like her -- of course she bribed them with catnip and toys. I was very impressed. Professional Pet Nanny will go above and beyond their daily pet sitting. I was leaving for a business trip and I noticed the morning I was leaving, he had developed a urinary track infection. Kyle picked him up and took him to the vets. Kyle sat in the waiting room until Oscar was examined, took him back home and sat with him for a few hours to make sure he did not have a reaction to the meds. I'm very grateful for Kyle and Professional Pet Nanny. I would highly recommend them to anyone who is looking for a pet sitter. Gena H.

text: I have been using Professional Pet Nanny's services for about 1.5 years now, and I have been incredibly happy with them. text: I could not be more pleased with the job that Kyle did with Aslan while I was on vacation for a week. Aslan is almost 17 years old and he has to take two pills a day for hyperthyroidism. For years my best friend has watched him whenever I left for vacation, but she recently moved to Florida and for the first time I had to have someone take care of Aslan for me that didn't know his routine. I read all the reviews on Angie's list and called Kyle. From the first moments of the phone interview I started to be more comfortable, after meeting with her, I knew that Aslan would be in great hands. She spent an hour with me going over all of his needs as well as what would need done with the house while we were gone. She also played with him and gave him cat nip, which he LOVES. I can't even explain the relief I felt knowing that I was leaving my very beloved cat in the hands of someone who would take such great care of him. Kyle sent me daily text messages with pictures and updates of how Aslan was doing, she played with him, and had him taking his pills and generally just gave him the love I couldn't be there to give. She also went above and beyond with the house, as you know we've had a horrendous winter and Kyle actually shoveled my walk and drive so that it would look like we were home. She watered the plants, brought in the mail and the only reason she didn't take out the trash was because I told her she didn't have to (I only have to take out the trash to the curb about once a month). I couldn't be happier with the job she did and I will definitely use her again.

name: Angie's List User
text: Our cat Pete is used to lots of attention. He has lost quite a bit of weight because of health problems, so his eating and drinking enough was very important to me. He prefers to eat while sitting on my lap, so I typically sit in my recliner several times a day with him on a blanket on my lap and his food bowl on the arm of the recliner, and he eats and I watch TV or read or eat lunch. And of course Pete wants to be petted both while he is eating and as much as possible afterwards. So I was worried about going to Florida for several weeks in February and having someone just stop in, fill his food and water bowls, and leave. Pete's emotional as well as physical health were important to me. After research, I called Professional Pet Nannies, and Kyle, the owner, came to my house for a consultation to meet Pete and me. I was impressed with her and the service she offered and made a reservation for our time away. While we were gone, Kyle and/or her husband Tyler came every morning and every afternoon to spend time with Pete, in the exact same way that he was used to with me. Kyle called Pete a "lover" and enjoyed showering him with attention while he ate and she watched TV or read or made phone calls. (If he had been a younger cat that liked to play, she would have played with him too.) Kyle kept a log of the time she spent here, showing that she was here at least an hour and usually longer at each visit. She made certain that he had food in his bowl and fresh water and scooped the litter box each visit. She also closed the blinds and shades on all of our windows and turned on the porch lights before she left in the afternoon. Every morning, she opened all the blinds and shades and turned off the porch lights. After it snowed, as it did often that month, she and/or Tyler cleared our driveway and sidewalks. All of these things made it look like we were home. Every few days, Kyle sent me a text, usually including a photo of Pete looking extremely contented or asleep, with an update on how things were going. I found this immensely reassuring. When we returned home, we found Pete relaxed and happy, and at the same weight as when we had left. We settled right back into the old routine, but I got the feeling sometimes that Pete missed Kyle and the amount of time she spent with him. I did not always have time to sit down as long as he would have liked in those busy first days at home! I felt that Professional Pet Nannies provided outstanding personalized service which was well worth the cost. I have already made a reservation for our next trip. Pete will approve!

text: We have been using Professional Pet Nanny for almost 2 years. When we first started using the service, I was impressed that Kyle came to meet me in person, look at my house, suggest fun things for the dogs & bunny, and gave me a formal folder about their service, reminders to tell my neighbors that we would have this service coming, etc. Then, I also met with the nanny that would be coming to my area most, so that the dogs/bunny could meet her. The dogs immediately loved her. Anytime a different nanny has needed to come, they've always contacted us in advance to meet us and meet the dogs to ensure the dogs are comfortable with the new nanny. The website is very helpful, and the services are very reliable. I love being able to log in and schedule the service online. I always receive confirmations from Kyle within a day. When we leave on vacation, we receive texts from the nanny to reassure us that everything is fine. The nanny also will send pictures via text while we are away, showing the dogs out on a walk or playing with a new toy. When we come home, the nanny had detailed report cards for each day telling us if/when the animals went to the bathroom, how long the nanny stayed, if the animals were happy or moody, etc. Kyle and the nanny have also scheduled to come to my house separately (when not for nannying services) just to talk, ask me if they are meeting my needs, etc. When they come, I see how much my dogs love them, and I know they are in good hands. When we first started using the service, we had a bunny rabbit in addition to our 2 dogs. Unfortunately, during one of our trips, the bunny broke his back. The pet nanny was incredible during this episode -- she called us immediately upon finding the rabbit not hopping, and asked if it was okay if she took him to the emergency vet. We of course said yes. While at the vet, she called or texted continually to keep us in the loop and let us make decisions. Unfortunately, the bunny passed away, but when we came home, the pet nanny had left us a sweet note and a frame photo of the bunny that she had taken while at the vet. It was very touching & thoughtful. I think that the Professional Pet Nanny is a great service. We have always found them reliable, our animals love them, and sometimes they even pick up our house! It is a fantastic service, with great prices. We always know our dogs are in great hands, and it is so convenient that we can just leave on vacation and do not have to pack the dogs up, take them to a kennel, etc. We highly recommend!
